data.title: Sample: semiconductor equipment controls expand
data.excerpt: A synthetic policy event illustrates source-linked claims and downstream asset paths.
data.body: This fictional sample shows how TNL connects a verified policy announcement to entities, assets, and causal impact paths. It is not current news or trading advice.
data.author: TNL Bot
impactPaths: Export controls -> equipment demand -> production capacity

claims.text: The fictional control list expands to two equipment categories.

data.title: Sample: shipping corridor disruption raises delivery risk
data.excerpt: A synthetic logistics event demonstrates uncertainty and revision handling.
data.body: This fictional sample is intentionally uncertain. A later revision narrows the affected corridor and lowers the estimated duration.
data.author: TNL Bot
impactPaths: Route disruption -> delivery delays -> inventory pressure

claims.text: A fictional corridor is operating with restricted capacity.

contradictions.text: A synthetic carrier update reports normal operations on a neighboring route.
